summary: All three requirements (REQ-21, REQ-22, REQ-23) appear to be fully implemented. The new TownOfficeDashboardPage is created with admin access control, report display with all required fields, delete functionality, restricted-access message, and consistent theming. The route is registered at /town-office/reports in App.tsx. Navigation.tsx has the staff link in both desktop and mobile menus, and Footer.tsx includes the quick link.
